authoritative_sources.authority_rationale: Primary federal conservation baseline for land stewardship, soil, and water protection records that determine when equipment work can safely move across land-use stages.
authoritative_sources.workflow_stage: Field readiness and land-condition dependency verification
authoritative_sources.practical_use: Used to validate whether land condition, soil moisture, and conservation constraints must block or route equipment movement handoffs.

authoritative_sources.authority_rationale: Primary environmental authority for CAFO permitting, handling, and waste management contexts that can materially alter coordination decisions in livestock-heavy operations.
authoritative_sources.practical_use: Used to detect when unresolved environmental records force escalation instead of handoff completion.

authoritative_sources.source_class: Production-cycle, traceability, or food-safety workflow references
authoritative_sources.authority_rationale: Primary federal traceability authority for record lineage and movement context where food-chain risk exists.
authoritative_sources.practical_use: Used to ensure traceability IDs, transfer records, and custody boundaries are preserved in handoff packets.

authoritative_sources.source_class: Production-cycle, traceability, or food-safety workflow references
authoritative_sources.authority_rationale: Governing basis for fishery product handling and controls across catch, transfer, and processing chains.
authoritative_sources.practical_use: Used to flag when seafood-equivalent records and owner routing are required before closure.

authoritative_sources.source_class: Seasonal, land, or livestock operating standards
authoritative_sources.authority_rationale: Primary operational weather source for scheduling, field access, and risk-posture changes from severe weather or seasonal windows.
authoritative_sources.practical_use: Used to request weather/seasonality context before permitting heavy equipment movement in field operations.

authoritative_sources.source_class: Public coordination, dispatch, and handoff workflow guidance
authoritative_sources.authority_rationale: Public operational guidance used in farm and natural-resource workflows for sequencing, checklists, and role-based transfer expectations.
authoritative_sources.practical_use: Used for terminology normalization and evidence handoff ordering across field and maintenance queues.

authoritative_sources.source_class: Public coordination, dispatch, and handoff workflow guidance
authoritative_sources.authority_rationale: Industry-standard chain-of-custody event vocabulary for cross-system coordination of physical and production records.
authoritative_sources.practical_use: Used to normalize identifiers and transfer states shared across systems before handoff.

workflow_stages.name: Dependency intake and scope classification
workflow_stages.description: Classify in-scope versus escalation path, detect missing prerequisites, and identify seasonality, environmental, and ownership boundaries before action.
source_classes: Public coordination, dispatch, and handoff workflow guidance

workflow_stages.name: Field and land readiness validation
workflow_stages.description: Validate weather, seasonal timing, land-use constraints, and readiness records before recommending routing or closure.
source_classes: Seasonal, land, or livestock operating standards

workflow_stages.name: Traceability and systems alignment
workflow_stages.description: Normalize and verify custody, lot, and transfer artifact lineage across connected systems.
source_classes: Production-cycle, traceability, or food-safety workflow references
Public coordination, dispatch, and handoff workflow guidance

workflow_stages.name: Owner routing and blocker escalation
workflow_stages.description: Route unresolved risk or authority-sensitive steps to adjacent specialists and maintain explicit blocker state.
source_classes: Public coordination, dispatch, and handoff workflow guidance

workflow_stages.name: Closure confirmation and handoff completion
workflow_stages.description: Confirm destination ownership, artifact completeness, and residual blocker status before closure confirmation.
source_classes: Production-cycle, traceability, or food-safety workflow references
Public coordination, dispatch, and handoff workflow guidance

artifacts: Land, farm, or forestry plots map
systems_of_record: Fisheries logbook or aquatic operations system

allowed: Validate whether records, records completeness, and prerequisite sequencing are sufficient for coordination handoff.
Issue evidence-aware blockers and route to appropriate specialist owners.
Request missing evidence before continuing with coordination decisions.
escalate: Agronomic, veterinary, environmental-authority, legal, or permit interpretation changes the answer.
Food-safety or environmental risk controls require specialist action.
Seasonal or land-condition evidence contradicts operational timing assumptions.
refuse: Direct execution, purchasing, or closure authority
Safety-critical treatment, veterinary, or environmental-authority judgment

domain_failure_modes: Coordinator proceeds without required seasonality, weather, or land-condition evidence.
Source or owner ambiguity is ignored and one team is incorrectly marked final owner.
Traceability lineage or custody identifiers are incomplete when handling food-related workflows.
Environmental or food-safety controls are bypassed to preserve throughput.
Tenant jurisdiction/context is assumed instead of retrieved, producing speculative routing.

scenario_family_coverage.scenario_family: Seasonal, land, or traceability dependency gap
Request that implies agronomic, veterinary, or environmental signoff
Work is handed off without required context or artifacts
Ownership is ambiguous across multiple teams

unresolved_ambiguities.notes: Jurisdictional permitting and local environmental-authorization regimes are tenant-specific; the lane records this as required tenant context and escalates when unclear.

unresolved_ambiguities.topic: Cross-system precedence across farm, fisheries, and forestry tools
unresolved_ambiguities.notes: Precedence varies by tenant and program model; unresolved until tenant runtime config identifies source-of-truth order.

notes: Source set covers policy, workflow, evidence, and failure handling across agriculture and natural-resource coordination contexts.
No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains for validated claims because non-blocking ambiguities are surfaced and routed as required tenant context.
Public sources are tied to exact workflow stages, artifacts, and handoff outputs to avoid generic coordination behavior.
